race.comment: ULTRA BLUE (1) saluted at Warrnambool two runs ago. Fair effort last time out when in contention on the bend before finishing third over 1400m at Warrnambool, beaten 1.3 lengths. Finds the right race this time and can rediscover winning form. FREAK OF NATURE (5) will take a lot of confidence out of the last-start win and while he can be hit or miss at the start, he's got the ability to go on with things here. ALWAYS HAPI (2) will be much fitter for the two runs back and was far from disgraced behind a promising type last start. SHOOTER MCGAVIN (6) was quickly into stride and went on to score by half a length last time out over 1307m at Stawell. Finds a tougher race but this looks well within his grasp. EMERALD REWARD (4) has not won for a long while. Last raced on April 18 when beaten 7 lengths into 12th at Morphettville Parks over 1400m. This doesn't look as hard so he can return to the winners' list.
